scripts.cdklocal:bootstrap: if [ -f ../.env ]; then set -a; . ../.env; set +a; fi; AWS_REGION=@@ cookiecutter.default_region @@ AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=@@ cookiecutter.default_region @@ AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://127.0.0.1:${LOCALSTACK_PORT:-4566} AWS_ENDPOINT_URL_S3=http://127.0.0.1:${LOCALSTACK_PORT:-4566} AWS_S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE=true AWS_SDK_LOAD_CONFIG=1 cdk bootstrap aws://000000000000/@@ cookiecutter.default_region @@ --cloudformation-execution-policies arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AdministratorAccess
scripts.cdklocal:deploy: if [ -f ../.env ]; then set -a; . ../.env; set +a; fi; AWS_REGION=@@ cookiecutter.default_region @@ AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=@@ cookiecutter.default_region @@ AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://127.0.0.1:${LOCALSTACK_PORT:-4566} AWS_ENDPOINT_URL_S3=http://127.0.0.1:${LOCALSTACK_PORT:-4566} AWS_S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE=true AWS_SDK_LOAD_CONFIG=1 cdk deploy --require-approval never
